description_long: This is a dark, fantasy-inspired sword with a menacing design, featuring a jagged, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The most striking feature is a large, central eye motif embedded in the guard, surrounded by spiked protrusions that radiate outward, giving the weapon an ominous, almost sentient appearance. The blade itself is adorned with subtle engravings and has a gradient coloration, transitioning from dark steel to a faint reddish hue near the tip. The handle is straight and robust, with angular, geometric shapes and a pointed pommel, suggesting both functionality and intimidation. The overall construction appears to be metallic, with a matte, slightly rough finish that absorbs light rather than reflecting it. This sword would be a formidable and visually arresting object if encountered in an urban environment, likely drawing attention due to its fantastical and threatening aesthetic.
description: A dark, spiked sword with a central eye motif and jagged double-edged blade, featuring angular metallic details and a reddish blade tip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full detail of the blade, the prominent eye motif, and the spiked guard.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sword's thin profile and the depth of the eye and spikes, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same eye motif and blade engravings, but with less detail on the eye.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the sword's narrow thickness and the silhouette of the spikes and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, angular, metallic, pointed pommel, no visible grip wrap
attribute_ornamentation: large central eye motif, spiked guard, subtle engravings
